sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12917" key="a)pokoru/fwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποκορῠ´φ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n12917.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">concentration,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εἰς ἕν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4014.tlg001:22:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Prisc.Lyd.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
